name: Mrs. Field's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars.
2. Add the eggs, vanilla, flour, salt, and baking soda to the butter mixture. Beat for 3-4 minutes until the batter is smooth; if it feels dry, add a little more flour.
3. Stir in the chocolate chips, nuts (or raisins and oatmeal for oatmeal cookies).
4. Cover a cookie sheet with wax paper.
5. Scoop dough using a large spoon, placing balls about 2 inches apart on the sheet.
6. Change the wax paper after each batch of dough is placed.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8-11 minutes. The cookies may not look completely done when they are removed from the oven.
8. Do not halve this recipe or it will not turn out as well.
